blocks.body: Alternative questions (alternative questions) are questions that offer a choice between two or more options connected by the conjunction or (or). Unlike Yes/No questions, here you need to choose one of the proposed options.

{ "title": "10. Brief synopsis", "items": [ "Alternative questions — a question with a choice between options through OR.", "Structure: as Yes/No question + or + alternative.", "Answer — choose one option, NOT Yes/No.", "With do/does/did: Do you walk or drive? Did she buy A or B?", "With to be: Is it hot or cold? Are you A or B?", "With modals: Can you swim or dive? will you come today or tomorrow? (both).", "Більше варіантів: можна запропонувати 3+ варіанти через кому + or.", "З Wh-словами: Which do you prefer — A or B?", "Відповіді: один варіант / Neither (жодне) / Both (обидва).", "Intonation - falls on the last option." ] }
